reviews.review_title: Looks cool but can't get multi-player
reviews.review_description: Tried to get online multi-player to work but kept saying you can not join at this time...PLEASE HELP!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi! We're sorry you're having trouble with multiplayer. Please try these steps:

• Make sure you're connected to a stable internet connection.
• Close and restart Bowling Blitz.
• Check that you're using the latest version of the game.
• If possible, try switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data.

If the issue continues, please contact our support team at salesandservice@biswagames.com with your device details, and we'll be happy to investigate further and help get you back into multiplayer.

reviews.review_title: 🎳  A Carnival of Fun and Strikes
reviews.review_description:
Bowling Blitz: Celebrate the Carnival delivers a solid and satisfying VR bowling experience. The mechanics feel natural and responsive, making every throw intuitive and rewarding.

What really sets this game apart is the incredible variety of environments — from bowling in an aquarium to striking pins among carnival dancers or under an icy dome. Each lane has its own charm and atmosphere.

The inclusion of special arcade-style modes adds an extra layer of fun beyond pure simulation, keeping the gameplay fresh and entertaining. A well-executed, all-rounder bowling game that deserves a spot in any bowling fan’s VR library.

Bowling blitz Is a fun Bowling game that has great graphics and visuals  I like that there are different theme Bowling alleys .there are powerups speed boosts and time reversal to name a few .it's single player

developer_response.body: Sorry about this — a recent server-side change caused multiplayer issues for some players. We’ve updated the game to work with the latest server patch in 0.1.45. Please update and try again; if you still have trouble, email salesandservice@biswagames.com with your device + region and we’ll help
